title: HOMEOWNER ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: REBUILDING TOGETHER WASHINGTON COUNTY HOMEOWNER ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides home repair services including carpentry, minor plumbing, painting, minor electrical work, debris removal, roofing, HVAC, weatherization, energy efficiency work, grab bars, and handrails. Nonprofit community facilities may also apply. Yard work is not offered as a primary service, but may be done if it is needed as a part of a larger project and there are volunteers able to do the work. Can not assist with rental properties, duplexes, recent purchases requiring repairs, or houses that are subject to foreclosure actions or actions to enforce liens. 12550 SW 3rd Street Beaverton, OR 97005 Eligibility: -Serves low-income households below 80% Area Median Income (AMI). -Applicants must own and live in their home and be financially and/or physically unable to complete repairs on their own. -Applicant mortgage is current or paid off and not at risk of default. -Repairs must be safety and/or livability repairs -Applicant intends to age in place. Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-4:30pm Email (502) 523-0738 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 523-0738 Main phone Main phone (502) 523-0738 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for application FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of Income AREA SERVED: HVAC and Roofing: Clackamas County All Other Services: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Home Barrier Evaluation/Removal Services Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services Home Rehabilitation Programs Weatherization Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. REBUILDING TOGETHER WASHINGTON COUNTY
